mapper.select: SELECT M.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, M.ROLE AS role, M.BANK_CODE AS bankCode, ( SELECT X.MESSAGE FROM ( SELECT MESSAGE FROM FFG_CHAT WHERE (SENDER_ID = #{memberId} AND RECEIVER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID) OR (SENDER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID AND RECEIVER_ID = #{memberId}) ORDER BY SEND_TIME DESC, CHAT_ID DESC ) X WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS lastMessage, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FFG_CHAT WHERE SENDER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID AND RECEIVER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_READ = 0 ) AS unreadCount FROM FFG_MEMBER M WHERE M.ROLE = 'bank' AND M.MEMBER_ID != #{memberId} ORDER BY M.BANK_CODE, M.MEMBER_ID

SELECT M.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, M.ROLE AS role, M.BANK_CODE AS bankCode, ( SELECT X.MESSAGE FROM ( SELECT MESSAGE FROM FFG_CHAT WHERE (SENDER_ID = #{memberId} AND RECEIVER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID) OR (SENDER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID AND RECEIVER_ID = #{memberId}) ORDER BY SEND_TIME DESC, CHAT_ID DESC ) X WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS lastMessage, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FFG_CHAT WHERE SENDER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID AND RECEIVER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_READ = 0 ) AS unreadCount FROM FFG_MEMBER M WHERE M.MEMBER_ID != #{memberId} AND ( M.ROLE = 'admin' OR (M.ROLE = 'bank' AND M.BANK_CODE = #{bankCode}) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN M.ROLE = 'admin' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, M.BANK_CODE, M.MEMBER_ID

SELECT CHAT_ID AS chatId, SENDER_ID AS senderId, RECEIVER_ID AS receiverId, MESSAGE AS message, SEND_TIME AS sendTime, IS_READ AS isRead FROM FFG_CHAT WHERE (SENDER_ID = #{myId} AND RECEIVER_ID = #{targetId}) OR (SENDER_ID = #{targetId} AND RECEIVER_ID = #{myId}) ORDER BY SEND_TIME ASC, CHAT_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FFG_CHAT ( CHAT_ID, SENDER_ID, RECEIVER_ID, MESSAGE, SEND_TIME, IS_READ ) VALUES ( FFG_CHAT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{message}, SYSDATE, 0 )
